vibe_and_tone: Premium, luxurious, modern, trustworthy, and minimal. Enterprise-grade execution mimicking Stripe, Notion, Apple, and Linear. Clean structure, emotional depth through contrast.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tighter text-primary dark:text-white leading-none
rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-normal tracking-tight text-primary dark:text-white
rules.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-medium tracking-tight text-primary dark:text-white

surface_strategies.navbar: Crystal Glassmorphism: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-[#050B14]/70 border-b border-gray-200/50 dark:border-white/10 shadow-sm
surface_strategies.cards: Neumorphic/Flat: bg-surface dark:bg-surface border border-border dark:border-border rounded-2xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 ease-out

motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Fade-in with slight upward motion (framer-motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}, animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}, transition={{ duration: 0.4 }})
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Buttons and links MUST explicitly change text/bg color on hover. Elements lifting on hover should use transition-transform duration-300.
motion_and_interaction.list_stagger: framer-motion staggerChildren: 0.1 for features/testimonials grid items.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Use soft pulse skeleton loaders (bg-gray-200 dark:bg-[#112A54]). No heavy or chaotic animations.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 dark:bg-secondary dark:text-primary dark:hover:bg-secondary/90 px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-primary hover:bg-secondary/90 px-8 py-3 rounded-full font-medium transition-colors border border-transparent
buttons.outline: border border-border text-primary dark:text-white hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-surface px-6 py-3 rounded-lg transition-colors

component_guidelines.inputs: Shadcn UI default inputs, heavily customized to match rounded-lg, subtle border focus:ring-secondary focus:border-secondary.
component_guidelines.badges: bg-accent text-secondary px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide
component_guidelines.icons: Use lucide-react for UI interactions. Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone) for feature/marketing section graphics.

logos.brand_full: User uploaded lockup logo (Navy bg, Gold B mark, BrandKrt text). *Use local asset path or placeholder block if not provided directly, but ensure layout space accommodates a horizontal lockup.*
logos.brand_icon: User uploaded Gold 'B' mark. *Use for mobile nav and favicon.*

images.hero_background: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561998338-13ad7883b20f (Use as a heavily darkened texture overlay: bg-black/50 or bg-primary/80 over the image to keep text readable).

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: yarn add framer-motion @phosphor-icons/react lucide-react
FONTS: Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' via Google Fonts in index.html.
TAILWIND CONFIG: Extend colors with primary (#0A1F44) and secondary (#D4AF37) variables. Map them to CSS variables for dark mode support.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all interactive elements include `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid='hero-cta-influencer'`).
HERO LAYOUT: Use the abstract texture background with a deep navy/black overlay (`bg-primary/90`) so white text is highly legible. Do not leave the hero image transparent.

LOGO USAGE: Since the user has an uploaded logo, implement an `` tag pointing to `/assets/logo.svg` or `/logo.png`. Do NOT use text-only logo replacements. Use the icon-only version on mobile if space is tight.
SHADCN: Install and use standard Shadcn components for forms, auth cards, and dropdowns, but override their default borders to match the `rounded-2xl` card and `rounded-lg` input specs.
DARK MODE: Implement next-themes. The transition must smoothly swap the white background for #050B14 and the surface cards to #0A1F44.
AUTH PAGES: Use a split layout for Login/Register. Left side: Marketing visual/testimonial. Right side: Clean, centered form.
PRICING: Implement the 'Three-Tier Standard' pattern. Highlight the middle Pro tier visually with a Gold border and a 'Most Popular' badge.
